results.title: Texas Precious Metals earns 'world's heaviest silver coin' Guinness World Records title
results.description: US precious metals dealer Texas Precious Metals has officially earned a Guinness World Records title for the World's Heaviest Silver Coin, after an unveiling held on July 1, in Texas. Manufactured in partnership with Sunshine Minting, the monumental 2 500 troy ounce .9999 pure silver coin commemorates the 250th anniversary of the American Declaration of Independence and now holds the Guinness World Records title as the world's heaviest silver coin.
